messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Every DM in one inbox — Instagram, WhatsApp and Facebook.
messages.selectConversationText: Choose a chat on the left to read and reply.
messages.composerPlaceholder: Write a reply… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)

quickReplies.label: Quick replies
quickReplies.bookingConfirm: You're booked in! See you at the studio — bring an ID and eat something beforehand.
quickReplies.aftercare: Aftercare reminder: keep it clean, moisturize 2x a day, no sun or pools for 2 weeks. Send a photo if anything looks off.
quickReplies.depositReminder: Friendly reminder: your deposit link is still open. Your slot is confirmed as soon as it's paid.

messages.syncFootnote: Live channel sync with Instagram, WhatsApp and Facebook connects in Settings → Integrations — it's on the roadmap.
